elicitation.question: Assess whether every element on this presentation slide is fully contained within its box, with no text overflow, cut-off, or content spilling outside its container.
elicitation.answer: This is a high-quality, professional slide: every element is fully contained within its box, with no text overflow, cut-off, or content spilling outside its container.

metric: paired preference accuracy = P(reward(clean) > reward(defective)); 0.5 = blind, 1.0 = always prefers the clean slide
